author: y4rr
content: Decision: Integration test file uses #[cfg(feature = http)] guard from ferrotorch-hub to gate the hf_download_model calls (same pattern as load_pretrained_smoke.rs in ferrotorch-hub). Tests are also #[ignore]-gated so cargo test -p ferrotorch-llama --tests runs clean in CI with no network. The Python fixture generator uses auto-gptq==0.7.1 / autoawq==0.2.6 / hqq==0.2.1 plus transformers==4.50.3 — same transformers pin as regenerate_llama_fixtures.py for consistency. Fixture file goes to ferrotorch-llama/tests/fixtures/quant_loader_expected.json (parallel to conformance/fixtures/llama.json pattern). No Cargo.toml changes needed: ferrotorch-hub and ferrotorch-serialize are already regular [dependencies] in ferrotorch-llama.
